title: Resolving N+1 with DataLoader
description: Resolve the N+1 problem in GraphQL by implementing the DataLoader pattern. Apply request-scoped batching and memoization across deeply nested resolver trees to optimize data fetching.
objectives: Resolve the N+1 problem in GraphQL by implementing the DataLoader pattern.
Apply request-scoped batching and memoization across deeply nested resolver trees to optimize data fetching.
